password.label: Password
password.help: At least 12 characters. Mix uppercase, numbers and symbols.

nationalId.title: Open your SecureBank account
nationalId.subtitle: Let's start by verifying your identity.
nationalId.tip: Your bank will never ask for your password by email, SMS, call or WhatsApp.

name.title: What's your name?
name.subtitle: We'll use this name on your statements and communications.
name.tip: Use your legal name. Banks compare it with your government ID.

email.title: Your email address
email.subtitle: We'll send important alerts and security codes here.
email.tip: If you get an email with links to access your bank, don't click them. Always type the URL in your browser.

phone.title: Your mobile phone
phone.subtitle: We'll use it as an extra verification channel.
phone.tip: If someone calls saying they're from your bank and asks for codes, hang up and call the number on the back of your card.

password.title: Create a strong banking password
password.subtitle: At least 12 characters. Don't reuse it anywhere else.
password.tip: A strong, unique banking password protects your savings — never reuse it elsewhere.

totpScan.title: Set up your second factor
totpScan.subtitle: Scan this code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password).
totpScan.body: Open your authenticator app and add a new account by scanning this QR. If you can't scan, copy the manual key.
totpScan.tip: The authenticator code changes every 30 seconds. If anyone asks for it on the phone, hang up.

totpVerify.title: Verify the code
totpVerify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code shown by your app.
totpVerify.tip: Without this step we can't open the account. 2FA is mandatory because it protects your money.

email.title: Sign in to SecureBank
email.subtitle: Enter your email to continue.
email.tip: Always check that the URL starts with https:// and shows the correct domain before typing your password.

password.title: Welcome back
password.subtitle: Enter your password.
password.tip: If your password leaked elsewhere and you reuse it here, attackers could drain your account.

mfa.title: Two-step verification
mfa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.tip: The authenticator code changes every 30 seconds. If anyone asks for it on the phone, hang up.

verify.title: Signed in
verify.subtitle: You're now in your practice SecureBank account.
verify.tip: Sign out when you're done, especially on shared devices.

current.title: Confirm your current password
current.subtitle: For your security, we ask for it before changing.
current.tip: If you don't remember your password, use "Forgot your password?" instead of guessing.

mfa.title: Two-step verification
mfa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.tip: Your bank confirms sensitive changes with 2FA — this prevents attackers with your password from changing it.

new.title: New password
new.subtitle: You can't reuse previous passwords.
new.tip: A strong, unique banking password protects your savings — never reuse it elsewhere.

email.title: Recover access
email.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your account.
email.tip: If you receive a recovery email you didn't request, someone may be trying to access your account. Change your password.

code.title: Check your inbox
code.subtitle: We sent you a 6-digit code. It expires in 10 minutes.
code.tip: Your bank will never ask for your password by email, SMS, call or WhatsApp.

disable.title: Your bank doesn't allow disabling 2FA
disable.subtitle: For your security, banks always require two-step verification.
disable.tip: For safety, banks require 2FA always — it protects your money.

scan.title: Set up your second factor
scan.subtitle: Scan this code with your authenticator app.
scan.body: Open your authenticator app and add a new account by scanning this QR. If you can't scan, copy the manual key.
scan.tip: The authenticator code changes every 30 seconds. If anyone asks for it on the phone, hang up.

verify.title: Verify the code
verify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code shown by your app.
verify.tip: After enabling it, store your backup codes somewhere safe outside your phone.
